what_it_does: This file is a ledger-style metadata record for an image asset: it registers vt-architects/p-3 as a design-source image, gives it a content-addressed blob reference, and records provenance fields such as author session and creation time.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, dimensions, source, author_session, and created timestamp
The asset address uses an image://design-source/vt-architects/p-3 URI
MIME type is image/jpeg but width and height are both 0
Source is labeled design_source_material and links is empty
Body line reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — vt-architects/p-3.jpg'
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0 despite being an image asset
concerns: Width and height are 0, which suggests missing or unextracted image geometry
links array is empty, so no relationships are captured
No alt text, caption beyond the single source line, or content description is present
notes: A minimal, provenance-tagged ledger entry for a design-source image asset with a blob reference but incomplete dimension metadata.
questions: What visual content does vt-architects/p-3.jpg actually contain?
Why are width and height 0 instead of actual pixel dimensions or null?
What does design_source_material signify in this ledger schema?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a design ground-truth source record matches the content, but the zero dimensions mean the metadata is partially incomplete.
apparent_themes: Minimal metadata cataloging of design source material
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register and preserve an image from vt-architects as an authoritative design-source artifact within a channel-memory ledger.
novelty: The combination of an image:// channel URI, a blob://b2 content-addressed reference, and a design ground-truth label in a single markdown ledger entry.
contribution: It contributes a stable, named metadata record that links a design-source image asset to its content-addressed blob and provenance fields, usable as an asset reference in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A markdown ledger entry registering the image asset vt-architects/p-3 in the design-source channel with a blob reference, MIME type, author session, and zero dimensions.
intention_for_embedding: To record and preserve an image from vt-architects as design ground-truth material with content-addressed storage and provenance metadata.
